narrative: Senior Data Scientist with five years at Razorpay, a product‑focused fintech firm, based in Chandigarh. Strong verified skill depth in AI/ML, especially in retrieval technologies, lifted his ranking. He has hands‑on experience with Milvus and Haystack and has built learning‑to‑rank pipelines that integrate with Elasticsearch, directly matching the search‑and‑retrieval focus. His product‑company background and stable career trajectory add further relevance. Yet his platform engagement is below average, there are minor credibility concerns, and relocation to Pune/Noida may require additional time.
